---
title: "Conference Text Search"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: "https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/header.html"
      after_body: "https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/footer.html"
---

<style>
h1.title {
  display: none;
}
</style>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="search-common.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>

<div class="gb-search-shell" id="conferenceTextSearchApp">

<nav class="gb-search-nav" aria-label="Search tools">
<a class="gb-search-nav__link" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/search/">Reference Search</a>
<a class="gb-search-nav__link gb-search-nav__link--active" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/search/words">Conference Text Search</a>
<a class="gb-search-nav__link" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/blog/using-conference-text-search.html">Search Guide</a>
</nav>

<section class="gb-search-hero gb-search-hero--compact">
<h1 class="gb-search-hero__title">Conference Text Search</h1>
<p class="gb-search-hero__subtitle">Track words and phrases across General Conference with a cleaner Gospel Buddy-style layout.</p>
</section>

<section class="gb-search-card gb-search-card--settings-top">
<details class="gb-settings-dropdown">
<summary class="gb-settings-dropdown__summary">
<span class="gb-settings-dropdown__title">Search settings</span>
<span class="gb-settings-dropdown__meta"> </span>
</summary>

<div class="gb-settings-dropdown__body">

  <div class="gb-settings-top-row">
    <section class="gb-settings-card-mini">
      <h3 class="gb-settings-card-mini__title">Results</h3>

<label class="gb-setting-pill-row" for="wordsByConference">
<span class="gb-setting-pill-row__label">Group results</span>
<label class="gb-checkbox-pill" for="wordsByConference">
<input id="wordsByConference" type="checkbox">
<span>By conference</span>
</label>
</label>

<div class="gb-setting-pill-block">
<span class="gb-setting-pill-row__label">Measurement</span>
<div class="gb-pill-choice-group">
<label class="gb-pill-choice" for="wordsMetricPer1000">
<input id="wordsMetricPer1000" type="radio" name="wordMetricMode" checked>
<span>Per 1000 words</span>
</label>

<label class="gb-pill-choice" for="wordsMetricPerTalk">
<input id="wordsMetricPerTalk" type="radio" name="wordMetricMode">
<span>Per talk</span>
</label>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="gb-settings-card-mini">
<h3 class="gb-settings-card-mini__title">Display</h3>

<div class="gb-setting-pill-block">
<label class="gb-field__label gb-field__label--tight" for="wordsChartType">Chart type</label>
<select id="wordsChartType" class="gb-select">
<option value="scatter">Scatter</option>
<option value="line">Line</option>
<option value="bar">Bar</option>
</select>
</div>

<div class="gb-settings-inline-pills">
<label class="gb-checkbox-pill" for="wordsTableMode">
<input id="wordsTableMode" type="checkbox">
<span>Table mode</span>
</label>

<label class="gb-checkbox-pill" for="wordsCaseSensitive">
<input id="wordsCaseSensitive" type="checkbox">
<span>Match case exactly</span>
</label>
</div>
</section>
  </div>

  <section class="gb-settings-card-mini gb-settings-card-mini--filters">
<h3 class="gb-settings-card-mini__title">Filters</h3>

<div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--2 gb-form-grid--aligned">
<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label gb-field__label--tight" for="wordsYearFrom">Year from</label>
<input id="wordsYearFrom" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="1970">
</div>

<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label gb-field__label--tight" for="wordsYearTo">Year to</label>
<input id="wordsYearTo" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="2025">
</div>
</div>

<div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--2 gb-form-grid--aligned">
<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label gb-field__label--tight" for="wordsMonth">Conference month</label>
<select id="wordsMonth" class="gb-select">
<option value="">All months</option>
<option value="April">April</option>
<option value="October">October</option>
</select>
</div>

<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label gb-field__label--tight" for="wordsSpeaker">Speaker contains</label>
<input id="wordsSpeaker" class="gb-input" type="text" placeholder="President Nelson">
</div>
</div>
  </section>

  <div class="gb-btn-row gb-btn-row--settings">
    <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--ghost" id="wordsResetDefaults">Reset settings to defaults</button>
  </div>

</div>
</details>
</section>

<section class="gb-search-card gb-search-card--search">
<div class="gb-search-card__heading gb-search-card__heading--compact">
<div>
<h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Search conference talks</h2>
</div>
<button type="button" class="gb-info-chip" aria-label="Conference text search help" title='Use quotes for exact phrases, || for OR inside a series, parentheses to compare multiple series, and a minus sign to exclude terms. Example: (faith) ("plan of salvation") temple||temples -garment'>ⓘ</button>
</div>

<div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--1 gb-form-grid--aligned">
<div class="gb-field">
<label class="gb-field__label" for="wordInput">Search</label>
<input id="wordInput" class="gb-input" type="text" placeholder="Search conference talks...">
</div>
</div>

<div class="gb-btn-row">
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--primary" id="wordSearchButton">Search</button>
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary" id="wordClearButton">Clear</button>
</div>

<div id="wordStatus" class="gb-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
</section>

<section class="gb-chart-card">
<div class="gb-toolbar">
<div>
<h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Chart and comparison output</h2>
<p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">Click a point on the chart, or a cell in table mode, to see the talks behind it.</p>
</div>
<div class="gb-export-row">
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary gb-btn--small" id="wordsExportAggregate" disabled>Export chart data</button>
<button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary gb-btn--small" id="wordsExportTalks" disabled>Export talks table</button>
</div>
</div>

<div class="gb-chart-wrap" id="plotContainer">
<canvas id="plotCanvas" aria-label="Conference text chart"></canvas>
</div>

<div id="legendContainer" class="gb-legend" aria-live="polite"></div>
<div id="aggregateTableContainer"></div>
</section>

<div id="talksTableContainer"></div>

</div>

<script src="search-common.js"></script>
<script src="words-search.js"></script>
